headline: Trimble (TRMB) Is Among The Top Lowest Forward P/E Stocks In The S&P 500
summary: With a forward P/E of 15.11x and upside potential of 56.90%, Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) ranks among the top 10 lowest forward P/E stocks in the S&P 500. A beat-and-raise quarter gave Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) a strong start to 2026, though the stock’s muted reaction and a pair of analyst target cuts since have tempered the […]
